description:
Offered: every third semester
This survey course focuses on non-English language Drama across the ages. The works of the Golden Age of Greece, Moliere, Pirandello, Dario Fo, Brecht, great Spanish writers like Calderon, Lope de Vega and Lorca, Japanese masters like Chicamatzu and Kanimi, might be studied in this course.
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, DP, LI
